data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Calendar sync (Google/Outlook)'. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the integration or functionality of calendar synchronization with these platforms. The linked use case mentions the need for calendar sync, but without any supporting evidence of its implementation or functionality, this requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of calendar synchronization with Google/Outlook.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
